description: Box plots comparing the distribution of 2025 School Performance Grade scores across four locales, sorted by median: Suburb (median 64), City (63), Rural (61), and Town (58), each showing median, interquartile range, and outliers on a shared 20-to-100 score axis. Town is highlighted in rust as the lowest-median locale; the others are neutral grey. Whiskers reach the furthest score within 1.5 times the interquartile range; dots beyond them are outliers.

title.text: Town schools post the lowest median score
title.subtitle: Distribution of SPG scores by locale, regular schools, 2025 — box = middle 50%, line = median, dots = outliers.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI School Performance Grades (overall SPG score), regular schools, 2025. Style-guide demo.
